subcodes.first_line: Endeavor and strive eagerly that you may progress and advance rapidly. You are born in this holy day
subcodes.subjects: @bringing oneself to account each day, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
